PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER MARK PRINGLE COMPANY LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AS TO RESPONDENT NORRIED FAMILY PROPERTIES LP, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER MARK PRINGLE COMPANY LLC'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 18, 2013 TO GIVE OPPOSING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. OPPOSING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN NOVEMBER 21, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING AND REPLY PAPERS. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER MARK PRINGLE COMPANY LLC'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD - THE COURT GRANTS MARK PRINGLE COMPANY, LLC'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND DENIES NORRIED FAMILY PROPERTIES, L.P. ("NORRIED") PETITION TO VACATE ARBITRATION AWARD. NORRIED FAILS TO ESTABLISH A BASIS TO VACATE THE AWARD. THE PARTIES SUBMITTED THE ISSUE REGARDING WHETHER NORRIED FAMILY PROPERTIES, L.P. PERFORMED PARAGRAPH 3.6.1 OF THE PARTIES' AGREEMENT AND WHETHER SUCH PERFORMANCE WOULD HAVE BEEN ILLEGAL. THE ARBITRATOR RULED ON THE ISSUE AND THE DECISION IS FINAL. SEE MONCHARSH V. HEILY & BLASE (1992) 3 CAL.4TH 1, 11 AND 30. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Dec-23-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ANDREW S. AZARMI OF MCKENNA LONG & ALDRIDGE LLP, TEL. NO. 356-4631 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
ATTY. KENNETH M. FOLEY APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; PETITIONER MARK PRINGLE COMPANY LLC'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award - The Court grants Mark Pringle Company, LLC's Petition to Confirm Arbitration Award and denies Norried Family Properties, L.P. ("Norried") Petition to Vacate Arbitration Award. Norried fails to establish a basis to vacate the award. The parties submitted the issue regarding whether Norried Family Properties, L.P. performed paragraph 3.6.1 of the parties' agreement and whether such performance would have been illegal. The arbitrator ruled on the issue and the decision is final. See Moncharsh v. Heily & Blase (1992) 3 Cal.4th 1, 11 and 30. Order and Judgment signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/MJM

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Dec-18-2013 Continued To Dec-23-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: ANDREW AZARMI, ESQ., 415.356.4631, FOR PETITIONER MARK PRINGLE COMPANY LLC.
KENNETH FOLEY, ESQ., 209.754.1891, FOR RESPONDENT NORRIED FAMILY PROPERTIES, L.P.

RULING: matter argued. THE COURT CONTINUES HEARING ON PETITIONER MARK PRINGLE COMPANY LLC'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award TO DECEMBER 23, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 302. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Tony Vaughn, CSR #6185

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Nov-21-2013 Continued To Dec-18-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Petitioner MARK PRINGLE COMPANY LLC'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award IS Continued to December 18, 2013 to give opposing party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than November 21, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be granted. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the moving and reply papers. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185
